title: Angles of attack for continual learning safety
summary: Angles of attack for continual learning safety
whyItMatters: This is the fourth post in the sequence Implications of Continual Learning for LLM Agents . Summary Continual learning is a capability that largely doesn’t exist yet in LLMs. We first want to acknowledge that this may make it difficult to identify tractable angles of attack for making CL safer: it may be too difficult to predict how the development of CL wi…
